summary: Ran backend + frontend regression checks for live-order-monitor upgrade scope on public preview URL. Requested rendering/integration checks passed; live wallet fill-state behavior remains unvalidated in automation due to missing wallet extension/signature flow.
action_items: Execute one manual live-wallet pass (connect + authorize + place/cancel small order) to validate PARTIAL/FILLED/CANCELLED lifecycle badge transitions with real CLOB data.
Verify 15-second auto-refresh updates the fill diagnostics and last-sync timestamp while History/Positions stay open during live order changes.
critical_code_review_comments: sidebar.js normalizeOpenOrder maps any non-BUY side to 'NO'; unexpected or missing upstream side values can be mislabeled and should be guarded explicitly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Verified: History view renders and includes Live Order Monitor section; Positions view shows open-order sync control + activity list; status banner remains visible; market data still loads; no page error selectors found; backend proxy pytest suite still passes (7/7). Not validated: real wallet-authorized open-order lifecycle badge changes because browser automation has no wallet extension/signature support.
rca of the issue: No blocking regression reproduced in requested scope. Remaining validation gap is environment-driven (wallet extension/signature unavailable), not a confirmed code failure.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
